title: Open player-funded bounties store (v2)
description: World-scoped ledger of open player-funded bounties, persisted as the single file data/world-state/bounties.json. Each entry is one backer's gold stake on a target: either a mob type (target_kind MOB, payable to whoever next kills a mob of that type anywhere) or a specific rival player (target_kind PLAYER, payable to whoever next defeats them in a consensual duel). Several backers may stake the same target (each a separate entry); at most one open entry exists per (backer, target_kind, target_id) triple. A post debits the stake from the backer, a cancel refunds it, and a payout hands the pooled total to the victor — gold is never created or destroyed. v2 is additive over v1: v1 mob-only files (schema_version 1, entries with mob_template_id/mob_name and no target_* fields) still load unchanged, interpreted as MOB-kind bounties. The loader is deliberately defensive: a missing, empty, or malformed file yields no bounties. Absence of this file simply means no bounties are open.

bounties.description: One entry per open backer stake.

backer.description: Username of the player who posted and funds this bounty.

target_kind.description: Discriminates the target: a mob type (MOB) or a specific player (PLAYER).

target_id.description: Stable target identity: a mob template id (MOB) or the target player's username value (PLAYER).

target_name.description: Target display name captured at post time, used in listings and announcements.

posted_tick.description: Game tick at which the bounty was posted (used to report its age).
